name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Request

### User Story
_As a [type of user], I want [some goal or action] so that [some benefit or value]._



### Description
_Provide a high-level description of the feature. Include relevant context or background information that helps clarify the purpose and scope._



### Acceptance Criteria
_List the measurable criteria or conditions that must be met for the feature to be considered complete. Ensure each item is testable and specific._

- [ ] 

### Additional Details



#### Assumptions and Constraints
_Outline any assumptions, limitations, or constraints that may impact the feature._



#### Dependencies
_Mention any external systems, APIs, or related features that this relies on._



### Design/Mockups (if applicable)
_Include wireframes, flowcharts, or other design artifacts here if available._



### Out of Scope
_Clearly state what is not included in the scope of this feature._



### Implementation Notes (optional)
_Add any technical considerations, proposed approaches, or open questions for the development team._
